problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Bacteriophage surface display for targeting may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
